---
title: Personnages
author: Raphaële Slimane
image: https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1779807244/Template_4_my9t9a.png
description: Weirdo drawing club
categories: ["generalillustration"]
date: 2026-01-10
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

![](https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1779807244/Template_4_my9t9a.png)
